name: grist-widget-studio-pro
description: A powerful IDE to build custom Grist widgets with HTML/CSS/JS, live preview, CORS proxy, API tester, templates, and more.

grist.name: Widget Studio Pro
grist.description: A powerful in-browser IDE to build custom Grist widgets: Monaco editor (HTML/CSS/JS/JSON), live preview, API tester, CORS proxy, template library, dark mode.

author: Said Hamadou (isaytoo)
